name: Beijing Easpring Material Technology CO.,LTD.
summary: Beijing Easpring Material Technology CO.,LTD. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of energy materials in China and internationally. The company offers cathode materials for lithium ion batteries; and NCM532, NCM622, and lithium cobalt oxide materials. It also provides NCA, LCO, LMO, and precursor materials, which are used in electric vehicle, consumer electronics, energy storage terminals, and other fields. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
